docs.title: 1. Summary or Overview
docs.text: This document provides guidance on how to contact technical support and submit support tickets for CabinetSense software.

docs.title: Contacting Support:
docs.text: Email Support: Send an email to support@cabinetsense.com with a detailed description of your issue, including any relevant screenshots or files. Phone Support: Call our support line at 1-800-123-4567 during business hours for immediate assistance. Online Support Portal: Visit our support portal at support.cabinetsense.com and submit a support ticket.

docs.title: Submitting Support Tickets:
docs.text: Navigate to the Support Portal: Go to support.cabinetsense.com. Create a New Ticket: Click on the "Submit a Ticket" button. Provide Details: Fill in the required fields such as contact information, software version, and a detailed description of the issue. Attach Files: If necessary, attach any relevant files or screenshots to help our support team understand the problem. Submit Ticket: Click on the "Submit" button to send the ticket to our support team.

docs.title: Frequently Asked Questions:
docs.text: How long does it take for support to respond to a ticket? Our support team aims to respond to tickets within 24-48 hours during business days. Can I call for support outside of business hours? Our phone support is available during business hours only, but you can always email us for assistance. Do I need an active subscription to access support? Yes, a valid subscription is required to access technical support services. What information should I include in my support ticket? Provide a detailed description of the issue, relevant screenshots or files, and your contact information. Can I track the progress of my support ticket? Yes, you can log in to the support portal to track the status and updates of your submitted ticket.

docs.title: Summary or Overview
docs.text: This document provides detailed information about CabinetSense licensing, activation, and license management. It covers essential aspects of licensing, including how to activate your license, manage licenses, and troubleshoot common licensing issues.

docs.title: Activating Your License
docs.text: Launch CabinetSense software. Navigate to the License section in the software. Click on the 'Activate License' button. Enter your license key in the designated field. Click 'Activate' to complete the activation process.

docs.title: Managing Licenses
docs.text: To manage licenses, go to the License section in the software. Here, you can view details about your current license, including expiration date and activation status. To deactivate a license, click on the 'Deactivate License' button and follow on-screen instructions.

docs.title: 1. How do I purchase a CabinetSense license?
docs.text: To purchase a CabinetSense license, visit our official website and select the desired license package. Complete the purchase process, and you will receive a license key via email.

docs.title: 2. Can I transfer my CabinetSense license to another computer?
docs.text: Yes, you can transfer your license to another computer. Deactivate the license from the current computer and activate it on the new computer using the same license key.

docs.title: 3. What happens if my license expires?
docs.text: If your license expires, you will no longer have access to premium features of CabinetSense software. Contact our support team to renew your license.

docs.title: 4. How many computers can I activate my CabinetSense license on?
docs.text: Each CabinetSense license is valid for a single computer. Contact support if you need to transfer the license to another computer.

docs.title: 5. Can I use CabinetSense software offline?
docs.text: CabinetSense software requires an internet connection for license activation. However, once activated, you can use the software offline for a limited period before reactivation is required.

docs.text: Some users may experience difficulties activating their license due to firewall restrictions. Ensure that your firewall settings allow CabinetSense software to communicate with our licensing servers. In rare cases, license activation emails may be delayed. Check your spam folder and contact support if you do not receive your license key promptly. By following these guidelines, users can effectively manage their CabinetSense licenses and ensure uninterrupted access to the software's features.

docs.title: CabinetSense Software Knowledge Base: Make an Appointment
1. Summary or Overview
docs.text: This document serves as a guide on how to schedule appointments with the support or sales team using CabinetSense software. Users will learn the step-by-step process, frequently asked questions, tutorials, and known issues related to making appointments.

docs.title: 2. How to
docs.text: To make an appointment with the support or sales team in CabinetSense software, follow these steps: Open the CabinetSense software on your computer. Navigate to the "Appointments" or "Support" section in the software. Click on the "Schedule Appointment" button. Select the type of appointment (support or sales). Choose a suitable date and time for the appointment from the available slots. Fill in the required details such as your name, contact information, and reason for the appointment. Click on the "Confirm Appointment" button to finalize the booking. You will receive a confirmation email with the appointment details.

docs.title: Q: How far in advance can I schedule an appointment?
docs.text: A: Users can typically schedule appointments up to two weeks in advance, depending on the availability of slots.

docs.title: Q: Can I reschedule or cancel an appointment?
docs.text: A: Yes, users can reschedule or cancel appointments by accessing the "My Appointments" section in the software and selecting the desired option.

docs.title: Q: What if I miss my scheduled appointment?
docs.text: A: If you miss your appointment, reach out to the support or sales team to reschedule based on their availability.

docs.title: Q: Is there a limit to the number of appointments I can schedule?
docs.text: A: Users can schedule multiple appointments based on their needs and availability.

docs.title: Q: How can I contact the support team for urgent assistance?
docs.text: A: For urgent assistance, users can directly call the support team using the provided contact information in the software.
